metadata.file_path: /Volumes/My Passport/Ojo otra vez musica de Tidal Original descarga/Consolidado2025/Tracks/Duran Duran - Rio.flac
metadata.title: Rio
metadata.lyrics:
[00:33.73] Moving on the floor now, babe, you're a bird of paradise
[00:39.11] Cherry ice cream smile, I suppose it's very nice
[00:45.71] With a step to your left and a flick to the right, you catch that mirror way out west
[00:53.08] You know you're something special, and you look like you're the best
[00:59.60] Her name is Rio and she dances on the sand
[01:08.95] Just like that river twisting through a dusty land
[01:16.25] And when she shines, she really shows you all she can
[01:22.55] Oh Rio, Rio, dance across the Rio Grande
[01:29.85] I've seen you on the beach, I've seen you on TV
[01:50.28] Two of a billion stars, it means so much to me
[01:59.52] Like a birthday or a pretty view
[02:03.02] But then I'm sure that you know it's just for you
[02:10.53] Her name is Rio and she dances on the sand
[02:20.49] Just like that river twisting through a dusty land
[02:27.63] And when she shines, she really shows you all she can
[02:34.70] Oh Rio, Rio, dance across the Rio Grande
[02:40.42] Hey now, wooh, look at that, did she nearly run you down?
[03:41.23] At the end of the drive, the lawmen arrive
[03:46.38] You make me feel alive, alive, alive
[03:50.87] I'll take my chance, 'cause luck is on my side or something
[03:57.25] I know what you're thinking, I'll tell you something, I know what you're thinking
[04:02.09] Her name is Rio and she dances on the sand
[04:12.33] Just like that river twists across a dusty land
[04:18.77] And when she shines, she really shows you all she can
[04:25.76] Oh Rio, Rio, dance across the Rio Grande
[04:32.45] Her name is Rio, she don't need to understand
[04:38.93] And I might find her if I'm looking like I can
[04:45.75] Oh Rio, Rio, hear them shout across the land
[04:52.74] From mountains in the north down to the Rio Grande
[04:59.70]
